hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
try:
    req = json.load(sys.stdin)
except Exception:
    sys.exit(0)
path = req.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if path.endswith('.sh'):
    result = subprocess.run(['shellcheck', '-S', 'warning', path], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        print(result.stdout, end='')
        print(result.stderr, end='', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(result.returncode)
"
